three_star.title: Daily Broadcast

three_star.title: Daily Broadcast

three_star.title: Daily Broadcast

three_star.title: Daily Broadcast

four_star.title: Discord Late Nights
four_star.caption: Proof that our sarcastic banter is my favorite part of the day. Put a screenshot of a funny Discord chat here.

four_star.title: The Master Planner
four_star.caption: My favorite personal Event Organizer planning our next trip. 10/10 would hire again.

four_star.title: Artist at Work
four_star.caption: Just a brilliant interior designer doing what she does best.

five_star.title: Date Voucher: The ITB Nostalgia Trip
five_star.description: One full day in Bandung. You play the Event Organizer, I fund the FSRD nostalgia trip. Non-negotiable.
five_star.terms: Redeemable anytime. No expiry on the feelings.

five_star.title: Date Voucher: Dinner & Lore
five_star.description: You choose the restaurant. I pay, I show up, and I will happily listen to the full lore of your high school Haikyuu Original Character.
five_star.terms: Zero judgment on the restaurant choice. Absolutely zero judgment on the fanfic.

five_star.title: Date Voucher: Exhibition Guide
five_star.description: We find an art, animation, or design exhibition. You explain everything to me. I will not pretend to understand and then immediately understand.
five_star.terms: Counts double if it's an interior design exhibition.
